{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 1264 would allow Californians to access birth control prescriptions through a phone app.",
    "The bill clarifies prescribing telehealth law related to appropriate prior examination.",
    "An appropriate prior examination does not require a real-time, synchronous visit between a patient and clinician.",
    "Providers and medical experts have determined that the requirement of a synchronous interaction is medically unnecessary.",
    "Increased access to birth control through virtual care will help providers meet patients where they are.",
    "Technology has created another door to the health care system for patients to access their care."
  ]
